text: A faded and rusty fire hydrant in grass next to the street.
A falcon perched on a weather vane.
A man on a surf board in the middle of a wave.
A dog sitting in the front seat of a car.
A brown kitchen table with four chairs next to a counter.
A man standing on a skateboard balanced on top of an elevated ramp rail.
A vibrant orange is on a wooden table.
A man and girl with umbrellas next to green wall.
A very big rubber ducky in the water of a waterway in a city, with gate, pedestrians, and buildings.
A person holding a fancy pair of scissors.
